arts.ttl: 'Spurs are afraid and they should be' - Bodo/Glimt fans confident
arts.sum: BBC Sport travels north of the Arctic Circle to see how Bodo/Glimt and their supporters are reacting to what could be a historic season for the Norwegian club.
